questionHtml:
The diagram shows a type of fatty acid.

What type of fatty acid is shown?

A. Trans unsaturated

B. Cis unsaturated

C. Trans saturated

D. Cis saturated

meta.title: The diagram shows a type of fatty acid. What type of fatty acid is shown? A. Trans unsaturated B. Cis unsaturated C. Trans saturated D. Cis saturated
